svg.title: Full stack architecture diagram
svg.desc: Three-tier architecture showing Studio clients at top, Control Plane in the cloud middle tier, and Edge Agent on 512MB ARM hardware. NATS messaging connects edge to cloud. Zitadel provides auth. Extension processes talk to the engine over gRPC Unix domain sockets.

g.text: Salesforce, Slack, ML inference, cloud APIs
gRPC over UDS to the engine
Single Rust binary: agent + CLI + optional MCP

svg.text: gRPC over Unix domain sockets · extension.proto (semver, add-only)
